subject: Re: Working together
body:
Hi Devansh,

Thanks so much for the discovery call last week, it was really useful and my co-founder is on board too.

We would love to go ahead and get started with you. Let's go ahead. Send over whatever you need from our side to kick things off and we can sort the paperwork this week.

Best,
Priya

Priya Nair
Co-founder, Nair Studio
